briefdescription.para: Initialize the Multi Scaler core instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function initializes the Multi Scaler driver/device instance with the configuration parameters from the provided config structure. It copies configuration parameters and sets the instance to ready state.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Multi Scaler instance to be worked on
is a pointer to the configuration structure containing hardware build-time parameters

simplesect.para: The calling application must memset the instance structure to zero before passing it to this function

briefdescription.para: Start the Multi Scaler core.

detaileddescription.para: This function starts the Multi Scaler hardware by setting the AP_START bit in the control register. Auto-restart mode is preserved if previously set.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Multi Scaler instance

briefdescription.para: Check if Multi Scaler processing is done.

detaileddescription.para: This function checks the AP_DONE bit in the control register to determine if the Multi Scaler has completed the current frame processing.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Multi Scaler instance

simplesect.para: Non-zero if the core has finished processing the current frame, zero otherwise

briefdescription.para: Check if Multi Scaler is idle.

detaileddescription.para: This function checks the AP_IDLE bit in the control register to determine if the Multi Scaler hardware is currently idle (not processing).

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Multi Scaler instance

simplesect.para: Non-zero if the core is idle, zero if it is actively processing

briefdescription.para: Check if Multi Scaler is ready for next operation.

detaileddescription.para: This function checks if the Multi Scaler is ready to accept new input by verifying that the AP_START bit is not set in the control register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Multi Scaler instance

simplesect.para: Non-zero if the core is ready for next input, zero otherwise

briefdescription.para: Enable auto-restart mode for Multi Scaler.

detaileddescription.para: This function enables the auto-restart feature, allowing the Multi Scaler to automatically restart processing after completing the current frame.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Multi Scaler instance

briefdescription.para: Disable auto-restart mode for Multi Scaler.

detaileddescription.para: This function disables the auto-restart feature, requiring manual restart after each frame processing operation completes.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Multi Scaler instance

briefdescription.para: Set the number of output channels.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes the number of active output channels to the hardware register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Multi Scaler instance
is the number of output channels to configure

briefdescription.para: Get the number of output channels.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the number of active output channels from the hardware register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Multi Scaler instance

simplesect.para: The number of output channels currently configured

briefdescription.para: Set input width for channel 0.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes the input image width for channel 0 to the hardware register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Multi Scaler instance
is the input image width in pixels

simplesect.para: Similar Set/Get functions exist for all 8 channels (0-7) and follow the same pattern for Width, Height, Stride, Rate, Format, and Buffer address parameters

simplesect.para: The input image width in pixels

briefdescription.para: Enable global interrupts for Multi Scaler.

detaileddescription.para: This function enables the global interrupt enable bit, allowing interrupts from the Multi Scaler to be propagated to the system.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Multi Scaler instance

briefdescription.para: Disable global interrupts for Multi Scaler.

detaileddescription.para: This function disables the global interrupt enable bit, preventing interrupts from the Multi Scaler from reaching the system.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Multi Scaler instance

briefdescription.para: Enable specific interrupt sources.

detaileddescription.para: This function enables interrupt sources specified by the mask parameter. Multiple sources can be enabled by ORing the appropriate bits.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Multi Scaler instance
is the bitmask of interrupt sources to enable

briefdescription.para: Disable specific interrupt sources.

detaileddescription.para: This function disables interrupt sources specified by the mask parameter. Multiple sources can be disabled by ORing the appropriate bits.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Multi Scaler instance
is the bitmask of interrupt sources to disable

briefdescription.para: Clear pending interrupts.

detaileddescription.para: This function clears the interrupt status bits specified by the mask parameter. This should be called in the interrupt handler to acknowledge processed interrupts.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Multi Scaler instance
is the bitmask of interrupt sources to clear

briefdescription.para: Get enabled interrupt sources.

detaileddescription.para: This function returns the current interrupt enable register value indicating which interrupt sources are enabled.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Multi Scaler instance

briefdescription.para: Get pending interrupt status.

detaileddescription.para: This function returns the current interrupt status register value indicating which interrupt sources are currently pending.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Multi Scaler instance
